stemHtml:
What is the correct option about the following D-ATIS?

WSSS ARR ATIS F
0130 METAR
Exp ILS Apch segregrated PARL Ops in use
ARR RWY 02L DEP 02C
Taxiing guidance lights on all taxiways are on for lighting inspection
Junction of TWY EP and A3 including rapid exit TWY E3 Southbound CLSD due WIP
Wind 040 10 KT GUST 23 WIND DIR 360 V 040
10 KM FEW 800 FT FEW 1300 FT CB BKN 1800 FT
T 27 / DP 26 QNH 1020 NOSIG
ARR to ACK INFO F with APP on 120.3

options.a: The ATIS is for arriving aircraft only, there are some CB clouds with a base of 1300 ft, and runway 02 left is used for arrivals.
options.b: The ATIS is for departing and arriving traffic; Runway 02C is in use for departures; departures have to acknowledge they have received information F with Approach Control.
options.c: Runway 02L is in use for departures; visibility is 10 km or more; wind direction is 010° and wind speed is 4 kt.
options.d: ATIS message F is current; the temperature is 26°C; and no significant changes are expected regarding weather conditions in the next two hours.
